data.title: Fix FractalPattern not rendering (stacking + var() color)

data.body: Pre-existing site-wide bug: FractalPattern wallpaper is invisible on all 8 pages that use it. Cause: the layer is 'absolute inset-0 -z-10' but each page's <main> is position:relative with NO stacking context, so the -z-10 escapes to the root and paints BEHIND <main>'s opaque background. Fix: change FractalPattern's wrapper -z-10 -> z-0 (one-file fix; paints above the page bg, below the z-10 content wrapper that every page uses). Also fix a today-introduced latent issue: FRAC-203 (PoliticalClubPage) and FRAC-204 (PeoplePage) pass color=var(--...) to FractalPattern, but var() does NOT resolve in SVG presentation attributes (stroke=/fill=) — repoint those to the real hex from the data model (HOUSES forum palette.light / SECTIONS.people.deep). (Story's equivalent fix is in frac-205.) Off master.

Re-scoped + deferred: the z-index stacking fix folded into FRAC-205. FRAC-206 now covers ONLY the remaining var()->real-hex fix for FractalPattern color on PoliticalClubPage + PeoplePage (both merged but hidden from launch, so not user-visible). Do later off master as a small PR. Moving to backlog.

REVIEW: PASS (cold review). Diff exactly matches plan — minimal, surgical.

VERIFIED:
- Both pages now pass a JS const to FractalPattern (color={PC_COLOR} / color={PEOPLE_COLOR}), no var() string reaches an SVG attribute.
- Hex cross-check: PC_COLOR = HOUSES.find(forum).palette.light = #C83858 (houses.ts:289), matches token --color-house-political-club-light: #C83858 (index.css:44). PEOPLE_COLOR = SECTIONS.people.deep = #B65D19 (houses.ts:341), matches token --color-section-people-deep: #B65D19 (index.css:52). Rendered color unchanged from intent — bug was that var() silently failed to paint; now resolves.
- Bug confirmed real: FractalPattern.tsx renders color in SVG stroke=/fill= presentation attrs (lines 50,57,63,91,117,125) where var() does not resolve.
- SectorHeader correctly LEFT AS var() on both pages (color=var(--color-section-people-deep) / color=var(--color-house-political-club-light)) — CSS context, matches StoryPage. --accent inline styles unchanged. Out-of-scope items untouched.
- No sibling left broken: all 8 FractalPattern usages in src now pass literal hex or a data-model const (Lab #C44878, Neighborhood #4A5A30, Events #C13B2A, Campus #1A3A2E, LiberalArts #C41E20, Story STORY_COLOR const). Zero var() FractalPattern remain.
- Comments on both consts explain the SVG-var gotcha.

TESTS: typecheck PASS, build PASS (✓ built), conformance PASS (no net-new off-vocab colors). pnpm test: 7 failed / 148 passed = FRAC-199 baseline exactly (buttons x2, footer x2, navigation x1, neighborhood x2). None reference PoliticalClub/People pages; no new failures introduced.

Meets all acceptance criteria. Ready for done.
